creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Created attachment 163751
Updates vuln.xml

Hi

As requested with PR 204044 when I submitted an update to net-mgmt/lldpd there was also an update to vuln.xml that was done for.

The upstream author Vincent Bernat has recently added a security information page with information on the vulnerabilities that have been fixed back then.

The news is that the vulnerable versions were >= 0.6.0 < 0.7.19 not >= 0.5.6 which he revised. Please fix this accordingly, attached is a patch as example, unfortunately I had to do this on non-BSD box I hope it hasn't broken line ending. :-\

Regards,
Mathieu
